title: Rebase demo3 side controls into left and right screen space
summary: 0.6.40 fixes the deterministic demo3 left and right control placement by applying the owning screen transform delta instead of copying the middle control pose directly.
changes: Left and right demo3 control clones now apply the world-space position and yaw delta from screen_middle to the owning target screen before parent linking.
This rebase affects the cloned button, slider, display, toggle, and scale families that already live in the three-screen control contract.
reasoning: The controls were parented correctly, but they were still carrying the middle control transform, which left the side stacks overlapping the center stack in world space.
The deterministic fix belongs in the builder, not in runtime state sync.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: Left and right control groups should now sit near their own screens instead of piling on top of the center controls.
The middle screen can be tested without moving the side screens out of the way first.
knownIssues: This slice does not widen the A-B Clear family beyond the current authored template structure.
This slice does not add folder and filename displays or remaining-time formatting.
